name: ui-style-recipe-contract
description: Machine-readable contract for the global UI style recipe consumed by design agents and React Runtime. A UI recipe is global to the whole funnel; page-level config may choose variants but must not define unrelated visual systems.

identity.recipeId: Stable snake_case id, such as hard_training, calm_wellness, energetic_fitness, clinical_trust, or lifestyle_companion.

recipeMode.description: Whether the recipe came from an existing preset, was generated for this product, or combines a preset with product-specific overrides.

selection.productEvidence: Array of concrete observations used to justify the selected visual direction.

fields.productCategories: Array of product/category tags this recipe fits.
fields.audience: Audience descriptors such as age band, gender focus, confidence level, and sensitivity needs.
fields.modality: Movement/training modality such as strength, yoga, tai chi, Pilates, walking, fasting, or general wellness.
fields.emotionalPromise: What the user should feel the product can help them achieve.

fields.avoid: Specific visual/copy traps to avoid for this product.
fields.differentiationGoal: How this recipe should differ from previous generic runs.

globalTokens.rule: Tokens apply across the whole funnel. Do not set unrelated page-level colors.

components.rule: Component styles are global defaults. Page variants may use the same component tokens differently but must not create a different brand language.

choiceSystem.iconPolicy: Icons are optional and should be used only when semantic. The default should not force icons.

paywallSystem.rule: Paywall must stay visually related to the same global recipe while allowing a stronger sales-page hierarchy.

pageVariants.description: Controlled page-template choices under the global recipe. These are not page-specific themes.
pageVariants.rule: Page variants may choose layout/component forms, such as image_grid or metric_report, but must inherit global tokens.

forbiddenOverrides: using reference screenshot colors unless explicitly selected

derivedOutputs.themeJson: outputs/design/theme.json should derive tokens from this recipe.
derivedOutputs.artDirection: outputs/design/art-direction.json should explain the product-specific visual rationale.
derivedOutputs.screenBlueprints: outputs/design/screen-blueprints.json should apply pageVariants without breaking global recipe consistency.
derivedOutputs.runtimeConfig: outputs/config/funnel.config.json may reference selected page variants, but runtime behavior remains in runtime adapters.
